creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
Maintainer update of port astro/gpsman from 6.4.2 to 6.4.3,
	which GPSman's author released earlier today.

	Changes may be found at <http://gpsman.sourceforge.net/wGPSMan_7.html>.

Fix: Apply the following patch, then use your preferred
	tool to upgrade the port:
How-To-Repeat: 	n/a
